summary: Dashboard renders correctly in mobile narrow viewport with proper layout, beta signaling, and CTA styling. Minor palette deviation on verification prompt affects brand consistency.

violations.description: Primary CTA button 'Resend verification email' uses incorrect pink shade - appears to be a darker/different pink than the specified #ffb3c7 fill color

actions: Verify the 'Resend verification email' button uses the correct diner pink #ffb3c7 fill color as specified in M.palette.7
Ensure CTA button styling matches .diner-button component specifications from M.component.1
